2604.20329.title: Image Generators are Generalist Vision Learners
2604.20329.paper_summary: Recent works show that image and video generators exhibit zero-shot visual understanding behaviors, in a way reminiscent of how LLMs develop emergent capabilities of language understanding and reasoning from generative pretraining. While it has long been conjectured that the ability to create visual content implies an ability to understand it, there has been limited evidence that generative vision models have developed strong understanding capabilities. In this work, we demonstrate that image generation training serves a role similar to LLM pretraining, and lets models learn powerful and general visual representations that enable SOTA performance on various vision tasks. We introduce Vision Banana, a generalist model built by instruction-tuning Nano Banana Pro (NBP) on a mixture of its original training data alongside a small amount of vision task data. By parameterizing the output space of vision tasks as RGB images, we seamlessly reframe perception as image generation. Our generalist model, Vision Banana, achieves SOTA results on a variety of vision tasks involving both 2D and 3D understanding, beating or rivaling zero-shot domain-specialists, including Segment Anything Model 3 on segmentation tasks, and the Depth Anything series on metric depth estimation. We show that these results can be achieved with lightweight instruction-tuning without sacrificing the base model's image generation capabilities. The superior results suggest that image generation pretraining is a generalist vision learner. It also shows that image generation serves as a unified and universal interface for vision tasks, similar to text generation's role in language understanding and reasoning. We could be witnessing a major paradigm shift for computer vision, where generative vision pretraining takes a central role in building Foundational Vision Models for both generation and understanding.
2604.20329.paper_summary_zh: 最近的研究顯示，影像和影片生成器展現出零樣本視覺理解的行為，這讓人聯想到大型語言模型（LLMs）如何從生成預訓練中發展出語言理解和推理的突現能力。雖然長期以來人們推測創造視覺內容的能力暗示著理解該內容的能力，但目前對生成視覺模型已發展出強大理解能力的證據有限。在這項工作中，我們展示影像生成訓練扮演著類似於LLM預訓練的角色，並使模型學習強大且通用的視覺表徵，從而在各種視覺任務上實現最先進的表現。我們介紹了Vision Banana，這是一個通用模型，通過在原始訓練數據和少量視覺任務數據的混合上對Nano Banana Pro (NBP)進行指令調整而構建。通過將視覺任務的輸出空間參數化為RGB圖像，我們無縫地將感知重新框架為影像生成。我們的通用模型Vision Banana在涉及2D和3D理解的各種視覺任務上實現了最先進的結果，超越或與零樣本領域專家競爭，包括在分割任務上的Segment Anything Model 3，以及在度量深度估計上的Depth Anything系列。我們展示這些結果可以通過輕量級的指令調整來實現，而不會犧牲基礎模型的影像生成能力。這些卓越的結果表明，影像生成預訓練是一種通用的視覺學習者。它還顯示影像生成作為視覺任務的統一和普遍介面，類似於文本生成在語言理解和推理中的角色。我們可能正在見證計算機視覺的一次重大範式轉變，其中生成視覺預訓練在構建基礎視覺模型以實現生成和理解方面發揮著核心作用。
2604.20329.author: Valentin Gabeur et.al.

Barron, Kyle Genova, Nithish Kannen, Sherry Ben, Yandong Li, Mandy Guo, Suhas Yogin, Yiming Gu, Huizhong Chen, Oliver Wang, Saining Xie, Howard Zhou, Kaiming He, Thomas Funkhouser, Jean-Baptiste Alayrac, Radu Soricut
